target.query: select text from events where $timeFilter limit 1000

description: This dashboard shows live load test metrics provided by JMeter using influxQL queries on Influxdb 1.x database.

targets.query: SELECT last("minAT") FROM /^$measurement_name$/ WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("maxAT") FROM /^$measurement_name$/ WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("meanAT")  FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("minAT") FROM /^$measurement_name$/ WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("maxAT") FROM /^$measurement_name$/ WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("meanAT")  FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count")  FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("countError") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT 1- sum("error") / sum("all") FROM (SELECT sum("count") AS "all" FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE "transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)), (SELECT sum("countError") AS "error" FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE "transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null))

SELECT sum("error") / sum("all") FROM (SELECT sum("count") AS "all" FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE "transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)), (SELECT sum("countError") AS "error" FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE "transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null))
SELECT min("min") FROM /^$measurement_name$/ WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT max("max") FROM /^$measurement_name$/ WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'all') AND $timeFilter
SELECT sum("count")/$aggregation FROM /^$measurement_name$/ WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("sb") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter
SELECT sum("rb") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter

SELECT sum("count") as "# Samples", sum("countError")/sum("count")* 100 as "Error %",sum("count") / $aggregation  as Throughput, sum("rb")/$aggregation/1024 as "Received KB/sec", sum("sb")/$aggregation/1024 as "Sent KB/sec"  FROM $measurement_name WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter
SELECT sum("countError") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "statut" = 'ko') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "responseCode" !~ /^$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "responseCode","responseMessage"

panels.title: Over Time - Response Times, Active Threads, Network Traffic

targets.query: SELECT "avg" FROM "default"."jmeter" WHERE ("statut" = 'ok' AND "application" =~ /^$Application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction"
SELECT last("maxAT") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'internal' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("sb") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction", time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("rb") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "transaction", time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("count") / $send_interval FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("count") / $send_interval FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'all') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ko') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT sum("error") / sum("all") FROM (SELECT sum("count") AS "all" FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE "transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'all' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)), (SELECT sum("count") AS "error" FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE "transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ko' AND "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null))
SELECT last("count") / $send_interval FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval)
SELECT sum("count") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ko' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("avg") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval)
SELECT last("pct90.0") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("pct95.0") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("pct99.0") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("max") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("min") FROM "$measurement_name" WHERE ("transaction" =~ /^$transaction$/ AND "statut" = 'ok') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "$measurement_name" WITH KEY = "application"
list.name: application
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "$measurement_name" WITH KEY = "application"

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "$measurement_name" WITH KEY = "transaction" WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'internal' AND "transaction" != 'all'
list.name: transaction
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "$measurement_name" WITH KEY = "transaction" WHERE "application" =~ /^$application$/ AND "transaction" != 'internal' AND "transaction" != 'all'

title: Jmeter Consolidated Dashboard -Influxdb 1.x Using influxQL
